query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mall_view_history` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `lineUserId` int NOT NULL,
  `productId` int NOT NULL,
  `viewedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_view_history_user` (`lineUserId`),
  INDEX `idx_view_history_product` (`productId`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mall_view_history` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `lineUserId` int NOT NULL,
  `productId` int NOT NULL,
  `viewedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_view_history_user` (`lineUserId`),
  INDEX `idx_view_history_product` (`productId`)
);
